title: Wel.co = Breaking New Ground in Mallala

blocks.heading: Breaking New Ground in Mallala
blocks.body:
To mark the beginning of construction at Gracewood – a $100 million, 512-home masterplanned community in Mallala, Greenpoint supported Wel.Co with a powerful PR campaign that positioned the project as a major milestone for regional South Australia.

From announcing the ground-breaking to amplifying the community’s vision across national and local media, the campaign earned widespread attention, reinforcing Wel.Co’s commitment to unlocking housing supply in fast-growing outer-metro areas.
